member.name: T:Avalonia.HarfBuzzApplicationExtensions
member.summary: Configures the application to use HarfBuzz for text shaping.
member.remarks: This method adds a HarfBuzz-based text shaper implementation to the application, enabling advanced text shaping capabilities.

member.name: M:Avalonia.HarfBuzzApplicationExtensions.UseHarfBuzz(Avalonia.AppBuilder)
member.summary: Configures the application to use HarfBuzz for text shaping.
member.remarks: This method integrates HarfBuzz, a text shaping engine, into the application, enabling advanced text layout and rendering capabilities.
